title: Help! How to restore deleted Job ID?
excerpt:
Hi - a team member on my account has deleted the Job ID of a task. How do we re-store the Job ID? 
I’ve checked both the Trash to restore the item and the Activity Log, however the original Job ID isn’t mentioned on eith…

posts.author: tanday (Tanya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - a team member on my account has deleted the Job ID of a task. How do we re-store the Job ID?

I’ve checked both the Trash to restore the item and the Activity Log, however the original Job ID isn’t mentioned on either of those.

Can anyone provide some guidance on this to a Monday noob please?
